items.summary: Add a light/dark theme toggle button in the top-right area of the app header (visible on all pages) that allows users to switch between light (white) and dark themes. The toggle should display an appropriate sun/moon icon. Persist the user's theme preference in localStorage under the key 'acadmind_theme' so it is restored on next visit. Wire the toggle to the existing ThemeProvider in App.tsx and the CSS custom properties already defined in frontend/src/index.css for light and dark modes.

In frontend/src/pages/TimetableUpload.tsx, replace any text or error message that currently displays 'No' (or a negative/error response) when the user clicks the 'Extract Timetable' / OCR button with a clearly styled 'Coming Soon' message. The message should inform the user that this feature is not yet available, displayed inline where the result would normally appear. Do not show any error or 'No' text in this context.
